title: Respiratory system — share of certified deaths

metadata.publisher: Office of the Registrar General & Census Commissioner, India (ORGI)
metadata.extractedFrom: Statement 3.4: Distribution of Medically Certified Deaths by Sex and Nine Leading Cause Groups - 2023, p.27

metadata.coverageNote: MCCD covers only the ~22% of registered deaths that are medically certified (institutional, urban-skewed). It is India's own certified cause-of-death data but is NOT a representative sample of all deaths.
